name: agentpostoffice-monorepo
description: Cloudflare-native, self-hosted email inboxes for agents

scripts.build: npm --workspace @agentpostoffice/client run build && npm --workspace @agentpostoffice/cli run build && npm --workspace @agentpostoffice/mcp run build && npm --workspace @agentpostoffice/worker run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace @agentpostoffice/client run build && npm run check --workspaces --if-present && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tools.json && npm run openapi:lint
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:worker
